feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through life with yuri in heart

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.title: Unrelated to novels HDD Issue. Part 2.

link.title: Unrelated to novels HDD Issue. Part 2.

entry.summary: Yes, on contrary of what I have said yesterday, as you can see the update is still here today. But, you must understand, I got quite nervous at its yesterday’s noise along with its S.M.A.R.T. attributes. Although the noise was bugging me for a couple of weeks already, yesterday it just scared the hell out of me. Also, because I quite fast found a tool for migration (clonezilla.org if you interested) and made a necessary backups, I proceed a further research—a night-long one—and came to conclusion that I don’t actually have many applications which I’m using at present. In fact, only the settings are important. So why don’t just go with this disk until the end, and then begin again with a fresh installation. Thus here I am, upon the path ‘Until the End,’ with a hope to reach a destination before ‘It’ will reach me.

entry.title: Unrelated to novels HDD Issue.
entry.summary: This is the last update for a while. I had expected to go through, leastwise, with the first extra episode before this, however it’s the only choice now. My HDD trying to die right before my very eyes. Even though all the important data lay safe in second HDD, the applications (and a considerable number of them, too) is in the system drive. Thus, a single route for me is OS migration. Now, I need to find a proper tool for it, and, more importantly, proper HDD. Hopefully it won’t take long―however it certainly would―so no updates for awhile. May, as well, learn a bit of Japanese in a meantime. May be. Expect to resume my work before long.

entry.title: Episode 43. New Creators.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: What’s with that tuft of Rapha’s hair, it’s springing up in such a peculiar direction, wondered Lydia. However deliberately advanced in to the Dream Server, without dropping a word. The aim was to dream with Yuuyami, so the conversation with Rapha was cut short. A pale preach-coloured world. The world that proceed endlessly, at any direction. The place where the top and the bottom, the left and the right are unrelated. Unless Lydia will relate them from now on.

entry.title: Episode 42. My Hentai Motorbike is the Best in Universe!

link.title: Episode 42. My Hentai Motorbike is the Best in Universe!

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Strolling out of the library, Lydia stretched out. It was a sunny and very pleasant day. Lydia outfitted with a black mesh jacket along with mesh pants. Each of which made of materials having a high defensive power. Taking into account considerably arisen temperature, it is a little hot under accustomed jacket and pants.

entry.title: Episode 41. Michael.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Angel lightly flew down, placing its feet upon the floor. Age of the angel was around fifteen, its emerald-green hair bundled up on the right side.

entry.title: Episode 40. Apricot・Return.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Prico found herself vacantly sitting at the library service counter. Her work was yet done, thus she has nothing to do. Someone has tread their soles through the floor, but it was said to not patch it up. Prico filled desire to take off her maid outfit, and take a playful sexy poses. Soon, however, her interest set adrift, for no one to watch her. Reluctantly, Prico put on the maid wear, which she had taken off, again. A considerable amount of time has elapsed from Yuuyami and Rapha depart. The daylight has changed the twilight, the sun then ascend in the morning. However no one hitherto homed back.

entry.title: Episode 39. For the First Time…

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Yuuyami placed Lydia, who she was carrying, down, removed her maid outfit, and laid it out over the ground. Lydia took off her boots, sat upon the maid outfit, and attempt to undress.

entry.title: Episode 38. Right After the First Quarrel..?

link.title: Episode 38. Right After the First Quarrel..?

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: The sun had set utterly, by the time Ohan was repaired. Apropos, Ohan could not return to the lodge, for basement doorway being too narrow, so he destroyed the floor, that Yuuyami had penetrated, even farther, and only thereafter made his way to the room. Then​, in order to withdraw to his usual guard duty, he tried to pass outside, however the entrance of lodge was likewise too narrow to allow him go. Upon the time Yuuyami brought him in, Ohan’s body was divided into parts.

entry.title: Episode 37. I Want to Have a Sexual Intercourse!

link.title: Episode 37. I Want to Have a Sexual Intercourse!

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World

entry.summary: Hinagiku comforted convulsively sobbing Rapha. In a meanwhile, Yuuyami proceed a self-check. Apparently, my condition is different from usual. Not a distinct​ defect, it is worth, however, keeping in mind. Lydia is standing next to Yuuyami, observing the situation. Hmm, Yuuyami begin to recognise her own condition. There is a load upon the quantum brain, and the temperature within my body is heightened. However, such cannot be described as an intense heat generation​. To express it humanly, it is as being affected by slight fever. Origin of the load was immediately cleared by Yuuyami. The emotions. The great affection towards Lydia is the origin. Yuuyami was able to handle emotions well, up to certain extent, however not completely. Albeit, I didn’t shut down, and the processing performance improved significantly, in comparison to the previous time. Such is no exaggeration to say - I has grown.
